title: Totem of Defoko
description:
Defoko (Utane Uta) Totem of Undying!

Do you enjoy Utane Uta, the default Utauloid? Do you wish you could carry her around wherever you go?
body:
**This project includes 4 different resource packs.**

---

## Totem of Defoko 

This is the default resource pack most people will be coming here to download. This pack replaces the flat Totem of Undying sprite with a 3D item model resembling the default Utauloid singer Utane Uta, or "Defoko". 
This model aims to resemble the character while still keeping the general shape and silhouette of the original Totem of Undying item. 
![Totem of Defoko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1060ab2ef110a5145b3c928b79655daf036e6ac5.png)

## Totem of Defoko + Monster Energy

In tribute to the Discord UTAU EN Community and the「Default You」Defoko collaboration album, This Defoko has been given a White Monster Energy Zero Ultra! 
![Totem of Defoko + Monster Energy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0dbfbc3d714c09d759c0a6df26a136fcf56d829.png)

## Totem of Youfoko (Default You Album) 

Inspired by Defoko's look from the upcoming「Default You」compilation album! This Utane Uta dons a comfy jacket and holds an Ultra Violet Monster Energy!
![Totem of Youfoko (Default You Album](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a79d9434f7782e1fe1e62b79a0e44d4bd4af0ce9.png)

## Totem of Monster Energy

Did you only come here for Monster Energy for some reason? Have fun I guess.
![Totem of Monster Energy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a56b4c8ccf2b77a7e910052c7ddd7b87b218498.png)
